## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly leadership sync to discuss updates, challenges, and strategic initiatives across the company.](https://fathom.video/share/udQEfydP92RYTEXpo1f-Rip5vSQ1RFJ7?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New hires onboarding (5 today), including high-profile content expert Matthew](https://fathom.video/share/udQEfydP92RYTEXpo1f-Rip5vSQ1RFJ7?tab=summary&timestamp=28.0)
  - [Focus on developing repeatable processes for account growth and training](https://fathom.video/share/udQEfydP92RYTEXpo1f-Rip5vSQ1RFJ7?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Hiring remains a top priority, with new recruiters starting and multiple channels active](https://fathom.video/share/udQEfydP92RYTEXpo1f-Rip5vSQ1RFJ7?tab=summary&timestamp=738.0)
  - [Need for better documentation and training materials, especially around mindset and critical thinking](https://fathom.video/share/udQEfydP92RYTEXpo1f-Rip5vSQ1RFJ7?tab=summary&timestamp=1333.0)

## Topics

### New Hires and Onboarding

  - [5 new hires started today, including Matthew (former TechCrunch editor-in-chief)](https://fathom.video/share/udQEfydP92RYTEXpo1f-Rip5vSQ1RFJ7?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Company grew by 10% in one day](https://fathom.video/share/udQEfydP92RYTEXpo1f-Rip5vSQ1RFJ7?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)
  - [Need to develop a comprehensive onboarding "bootcamp" or training program](https://fathom.video/share/udQEfydP92RYTEXpo1f-Rip5vSQ1RFJ7?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)
  - [Bridget leading initial onboarding sessions, seeking feedback for improvements](https://fathom.video/share/udQEfydP92RYTEXpo1f-Rip5vSQ1RFJ7?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)

### Hiring and Recruitment

  - [Multiple recruitment channels active (Quantum, Somewhere, in-house recruiters)](https://fathom.video/share/udQEfydP92RYTEXpo1f-Rip5vSQ1RFJ7?tab=summary&timestamp=738.0)
  - [New recruiters (Tucker, Maria) starting this week](https://fathom.video/share/udQEfydP92RYTEXpo1f-Rip5vSQ1RFJ7?tab=summary&timestamp=738.0)
  - [Focus on getting recruiters up to speed quickly to take over screening and initial interviews](https://fathom.video/share/udQEfydP92RYTEXpo1f-Rip5vSQ1RFJ7?tab=summary&timestamp=1265.0)
  - [LinkedIn Recruiter license pending final approval (noted for high cost)](https://fathom.video/share/udQEfydP92RYTEXpo1f-Rip5vSQ1RFJ7?tab=summary&timestamp=1385.0)

### Account Growth and Management

  - [Concern about slow growth in some mature accounts](https://fathom.video/share/udQEfydP92RYTEXpo1f-Rip5vSQ1RFJ7?tab=summary&timestamp=1189.0)
  - [Need for a repeatable playbook to drive account growth](https://fathom.video/share/udQEfydP92RYTEXpo1f-Rip5vSQ1RFJ7?tab=summary&timestamp=1226.0)
  - [Focus on doubling down on what works, being more aggressive, and testing more](https://fathom.video/share/udQEfydP92RYTEXpo1f-Rip5vSQ1RFJ7?tab=summary&timestamp=1367.0)
  - [Importance of building trust with clients and having regular strategy discussions](https://fathom.video/share/udQEfydP92RYTEXpo1f-Rip5vSQ1RFJ7?tab=summary&timestamp=1400.0)

### Training and Documentation

  - [Need for better documentation of processes, especially around programmatic approaches](https://fathom.video/share/udQEfydP92RYTEXpo1f-Rip5vSQ1RFJ7?tab=summary&timestamp=1730.0)
  - [Focus on creating training materials that explain both "how" and "why" of processes](https://fathom.video/share/udQEfydP92RYTEXpo1f-Rip5vSQ1RFJ7?tab=summary&timestamp=1789.0)
  - [Emphasis on developing critical thinking skills and experimentation mindset in team members](https://fathom.video/share/udQEfydP92RYTEXpo1f-Rip5vSQ1RFJ7?tab=summary&timestamp=1540.0)
  - [Plan to record training sessions and create a comprehensive syllabus](https://fathom.video/share/udQEfydP92RYTEXpo1f-Rip5vSQ1RFJ7?tab=summary&timestamp=1789.0)

### Product Development

  - [Daniel working on streamlining processes in Airtable to reduce errors](https://fathom.video/share/udQEfydP92RYTEXpo1f-Rip5vSQ1RFJ7?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
  - [Challenges in balancing flexibility with standardization in workflows](https://fathom.video/share/udQEfydP92RYTEXpo1f-Rip5vSQ1RFJ7?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)
  - [Progress on Content OS, now in "yellow/high green" state](https://fathom.video/share/udQEfydP92RYTEXpo1f-Rip5vSQ1RFJ7?tab=summary&timestamp=989.0)
  - [New feature: ability to generate cover images for articles using Recraft API](https://fathom.video/share/udQEfydP92RYTEXpo1f-Rip5vSQ1RFJ7?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)

### Leadership Time Management

  - [Marcel feeling drained from context switching and numerous meetings](https://fathom.video/share/udQEfydP92RYTEXpo1f-Rip5vSQ1RFJ7?tab=summary&timestamp=680.0)
  - [Request for help in protecting leadership time and being more selective with calendar commitments](https://fathom.video/share/udQEfydP92RYTEXpo1f-Rip5vSQ1RFJ7?tab=summary&timestamp=1623.0)

## Next Steps

  - Bridget to email Kevin regarding the ops role and post the job description for a wider search
  - [Leadership to collaborate on developing a comprehensive onboarding/training syllabus](https://fathom.video/share/udQEfydP92RYTEXpo1f-Rip5vSQ1RFJ7?tab=summary&timestamp=1789.0)
  - [Jimmy to set up meetings with Kyle, Paul, Jacob, and Dave to discuss account growth strategies](https://fathom.video/share/udQEfydP92RYTEXpo1f-Rip5vSQ1RFJ7?tab=summary&timestamp=2560.0)
  - [Daniel to continue work on streamlining Airtable processes and product roadmap](https://fathom.video/share/udQEfydP92RYTEXpo1f-Rip5vSQ1RFJ7?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [Bridget to coach Alice on better managing Marcel's calendar and time](https://fathom.video/share/udQEfydP92RYTEXpo1f-Rip5vSQ1RFJ7?tab=summary&timestamp=1623.0)
  - [Continue all active recruitment efforts, including agencies and in-house recruiters](https://fathom.video/share/udQEfydP92RYTEXpo1f-Rip5vSQ1RFJ7?tab=summary&timestamp=1684.0)
  - [Marcel to record high-level training content focusing on mindset and critical thinking](https://fathom.video/share/udQEfydP92RYTEXpo1f-Rip5vSQ1RFJ7?tab=summary&timestamp=1333.0)
